title: Squirrel Removal South Bronx
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in South Bronx, Bronx. Humane extraction, attic cleanup & exclusion services. $900-$2,500. Fast response to Mott Haven, Melrose & Port Morris areas.
intro: South Bronx residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or commercial spaces need fast, humane removal services. Our expert team provides comprehensive squirrel extraction and exclusion throughout Mott Haven, Melrose, Port Morris, and surrounding South Bronx neighborhoods. We protect both historic brownstones and modern developments from squirrel damage with proven, wildlife-safe methods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving South Bronx properties, understanding the unique challenges of urban squirrel infestations in this densely populated area. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency response, humane removal practices, and permanent exclusion solutions backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: South Bronx's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, row houses near Yankee Stadium, and tree-lined streets along the Grand Concourse create ideal entry points for squirrels seeking shelter. The proximity to parks like St. Mary's and Franz Sigel means squirrel populations are active year-round, making professional exclusion essential for protecting your property.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in South Bronx typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and attic sanitization. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into South Bronx buildings?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter South Bronx buildings through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. Older pre-war buildings with deteriorating mortar or wooden trim are especially vulnerable. Tree branches touching rooflines provide easy access, making proper exclusion and trimming essential for prevention.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane and legal in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, NYC-compliant squirrel removal methods including live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not return. All our practices follow New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize animal welfare while effectively protecting your South Bronx property from re-entry.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to my South Bronx property?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), destroying insulation, gnawing on wooden beams, and contaminating attics with droppings and urine. In South Bronx's older buildings, they can also damage historic architectural features and create entry points for water infiltration, leading to costly repairs if not addressed promptly.
